overall.description: Gameplay footage from Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order showing the protagonist Cal Kestis navigating an Imperial facility. The character walks through dark metallic corridors with red lighting, takes an elevator down to a grand hall with a holographic Imperial logo, engages in combat with a Purge Trooper, and proceeds through a security corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: imperial facility corridor with red neon accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a dark metallic corridor illuminated by red neon strips

entered.detail: dark metallic grated flooring with hexagonal pattern
horizontal red glowing strips running along the base of walls
dark gray metal wall panels with vertical slotted windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark corridor in an Imperial facility. Red neon lights line the walls, casting a crimson glow on the metal grate floor. The environment is empty and industrial, with tall metal panels and grated windows.

events.description: character steps onto circular elevator platform and activates the console
elevator descends rapidly through a shaft into a lower level

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator console, activating the platform, and descending to a lower level

entered.detail: large circular platform with glowing red hexagonal center
tall white terminal with glowing red interface
geometric floor design surrounding the elevator shaft

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wider elevator chamber with a circular platform at its center. After activating a console, the platform descends through a shaft with bright overhead lighting, transitioning from the red-lit corridor to a new area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand imperial hall with holographic display

events.description: exits elevator into a vast imperial chamber with towering white architecture and blue lighting

agents.ego_description: walking across the expansive blue-lit chamber toward a large glowing imperial hologram

notable_agents.action: floating probe droid hovering near the left side of the hall

entered.detail: highly reflective blue illuminated flooring with white geometric lines
large glowing blue imperial crest hologram projected from a central pedestal
massive white structural columns rising to the ceiling
tall black column emitting the holographic projection

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a grand imperial hall with towering white pillars and reflective blue flooring. A massive holographic Imperial symbol glows above a central black pedestal. A probe droid hovers in the distance as the character approaches the center of the chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: imperial security corridor with guard posts

events.description: Purge Trooper emerges from behind the pedestal and engages in melee combat
character disengages from combat and sprints toward the exit corridor

agents.ego_description: engaging a Purge Trooper with melee attacks, then breaking away and sprinting down a corridor

notable_agents.action: Purge Trooper in black armor with red visor attacking with a melee weapon
Stormtrooper standing guard at the corridor entrance

entered.detail: smooth dark gray flooring transitioning from the blue hall
large metal door with illuminated frame at the end of the corridor
illuminated control panels mounted on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: A Purge Trooper ambushes the character in the grand hall, leading to a brief melee combat. The character then breaks away and sprints into a darker corridor where Stormtroopers stand guard, approaching a large exit door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial facility that opens into a grand imperial hall before narrowing back into a secure corridor. It begins with the character navigating a dark, narrow hallway where red neon lights cast a crimson glow over metal grate floors and industrial panels. As the character reaches an elevator chamber, the camera descends through a brightly lit shaft, transitioning away from the red hues toward a vast, open space. The scene then expands into a grand hall featuring towering white pillars, reflective blue flooring, and a massive glowing holographic Imperial symbol hovering over a central pedestal. Finally, the camera captures a brief melee clash with a Purge Trooper before the character sprints away, shifting back into a darker security corridor guarded by Stormtroopers toward a large exit door.
